event: abdominal ultrasound showed multiple gallbladder stones
large impacted stone (12 mm) in cystic duct
thickened gallbladder wall up to 17 mm in diameter
delayed enhancement of thickened gallbladder wall
thickened wall interpreted as inflammation associated with Mirizzi syndrome
computed tomography showed liver abscess in seg. VII
liver abscess culture showed vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus faecium (VRE)
inserted double pigtail plastic stent exchanged with shorter plastic stent
elevated total bilirubin level 44 mg/dL in drained abscess fluid
core genome multilocus sequence typing performed
VRE and LVRE strains belonged to same clone
linezolid mutation G2576T in 23 rRNA gene
improvements in infection after 2-month hospital stay
moderate differentiated adenocarcinoma of gallbladder (pT3 pNX L1 V0 R1 G2)
